records.title: DryGelWorld — Silica Gel Manufacturer & Exporter since 1983
records.text: DryGelWorld is a family-run silica gel manufacturer and exporter based in Karachi, operating since 1983. We supply sachets, beads, and container strips straight from our factory with low MOQs, full documentation, and delivery to 190+ countries. ISO 9001:2015 certified. COA and SDS available on request. DMF-free verified product. Over 10 million silica gel packets produced to date, serving 10,000+ domestic and export customers.

records.title: Products — Formats from 0.5g to 1kg
records.text: Three formats cover most use cases: sachets for cartons, bulk beads for volume, and strips for containers. Supply range spans 0.5g to 1kg. Small sizes: 0.5gm, 1gm, 1gm XL, 2gm. Paper sachets: 1gm, 2gm, 3gm, 10gm. Bulk and strip: 25g, 50g, 100g, 200g and larger. Export quotes are sized to your order with FOB, CIF, and EXW support.

records.title: White Non-Indicating Silica Gel
records.text: Clean white non-indicating silica gel sachets for cartons, electronics, leather, and repeat export packaging programs. Available from 0.5g to 20g and in bulk supply. Food-safe options available.

records.title: Orange / Blue Indicating Silica Gel
records.text: Colour-changing indicating silica gel that shows moisture at a glance, for teams that need fast humidity checks across storage and lab workflows. Orange and blue indicating gel options for relative-humidity monitoring.

records.title: Electronics & Semiconductors
records.text: Moisture control built for microchips, PCBs, and sensitive electronic components, protecting against corrosion and short circuits in transit. Non-indicating white silica gel and desiccant packs are used for electronics packaging and semiconductor moisture protection.

records.title: Food & Nutraceutical Packaging
records.text: Food-grade desiccant programs that keep snacks, spices, and dried export goods dry and shelf-stable for international shipping. Food-safe silica gel sachets suitable for food and nutraceutical packaging.

records.title: Ocean Freight & Container Cargo
records.text: Container-scale absorption for export shipments, preventing container rain, condensation, and inventory losses at sea. Container desiccant strips and high-capacity formats for long-haul shipments, warehouses, pallets, and container routes. Use the container desiccant calculator to size grams per container.

records.title: Leather, Textiles & Garments
records.text: Protecting leather goods, designer garments, and textiles from mould, mildew, and odour during long oceanic transit.

records.title: Pharmaceutical Packaging
records.text: Maintaining strict moisture thresholds for sensitive medical compounds, pill bottles, and active pharmaceutical ingredients against degradation. DMF-free product with SDS and COA on request.

records.title: Certifications
records.text: DryGelWorld operates an ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system. SDS and COA documents are available on request for export buyers. Product is DMF-free.

records.title: Container Desiccant Calculator
records.text: Estimate how many container desiccants you need based on container size, cargo, and transit duration. Enter your container and cargo details to get a recommended desiccant quantity.

records.title: Contact & Quote
records.text: Request an export quote by telling us what you ship. Quotes usually returned within 24 hours. Reach sales by email, phone +92 333 022 3337, or the contact form. Bulk contracts quoted by requirement with FOB, CIF, and EXW terms.

records.title: Top 10 Silica Gel Suppliers: World & Pakistan Guide
records.text: Top 10 silica gel suppliers in the world, and how to choose one in Pakistan. The global list covers W. R. Grace, Evonik, BASF, Clariant, Fuji Silysia, Multisorb, Desiccare, Interra Global, Sorbchem India, GeeJay Chemicals and WiseSorbent, with what each is best suited to. DryGelWorld is deliberately NOT on that list: it is a Karachi manufacturer, not a global top-ten player, and does not claim to be. DryGelWorld is the right call for sachets, bulk beads and container strips direct from a Karachi factory, mid-size and recurring programs, private label, and DMF-free documentation. It is the WRONG call for FDA-approved, food-contact-certified or pharma-DMF material (use Multisorb, Clariant or Grace), for molecular sieve, activated alumina, Tyvek or lab-grade silica (use Interra Global or Sigma-Aldrich), and for single retail packets. There is no credible published ranking of Pakistani silica gel suppliers; the guide instead explains how to tell a manufacturer from a reseller: ask to visit the plant, verify the ISO number, ask for SDS and COA before ordering, and ask what they will not supply.
